details.test: Task 1: Roof replacement quote for asphalt shingles under 12000
Task 2: Schedule earliest weekday inspection for ZIP 94105
Task 3: Choose preferred roofing material by warranty then price
Task 4: Select financing plan for 15000 project and start application
Task 5: Request emergency repair within 24 hours for active leak
Task 6: Save first three recent high-rated roof replacement reviews
Task 7: Start insurance assistance request from FAQ article
Task 8: Create residential maintenance plan and add to quote
Task 9: Apply highest roof replacement promotion to new quote
